decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from osteochondral defect of the knee despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after osteochondral defect of the knee treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
